about.title: About
about.bio1: Driven by a passion for technology, I put my skills to work on concrete and ambitious projects. I place just as much importance on code quality as on the final user experience.

items.title: Luwaas
items.desc: Real-time collaboration platform for developers, featuring a shared code editor, rooms and integrated chat.

items.title: Sunu Lekkol
items.desc: Fullstack e-commerce with inventory management, Stripe payments and a real-time admin dashboard.

items.title: AuthKit
items.desc: Open source JWT + OAuth2 authentication library for Node.js with ready-to-use Express middleware.

items.title: NoteFlow
items.desc: Note-taking app with live markdown, tags, full-text search and cloud synchronization.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a project in mind? An opportunity to share? I'm open to new collaborations and meaningful exchanges.
